profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk manufactures formalin and formalin derivative products in Indonesia. It offers formalin, urea formaldehyde resins, melamine urea formaldehyde resins, phenol formaldehyde resins, UFP 1001 powder resins, one-step glue powder resins, and MFP 134 powder resins, as well as UF RIW CARB, hardeners, and catchers. The company is also involved in the real estate activities. The company was formerly known as PT Intan Wijaya Chemical Industry and changed its name to PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk in June 2000. PT Intanwijaya Internasional Tbk was incorporated in 1981 and is headquartered in Jakarta Barat, Indonesia.
